completed_tasks.name: Final targeted and full validation sign-off
completed_tasks.progress: Targeted Phase 11 tests, npm run check, requirement grep, and output-channel grep passed. Validation evidence was added to 11-VALIDATION.md. Remaining work is documentation/metadata closeout: create 11-03-SUMMARY.md, correct/commit planning docs, and finish phase completion bookkeeping.

remaining_tasks.name: Final targeted and full validation sign-off
remaining_tasks.remaining: Create .planning/phases/11-import-command-orchestration/11-03-SUMMARY.md; fix the malformed ROADMAP Phase 11 row produced by pi-gsd-tools; decide whether to keep/revert incidental STATE/config changes; commit metadata/docs.

decisions.decision: Use a hermetic command-level fixture and mock GitOps instead of live network for the import e2e.
decisions.rationale: Plan 11-03 needed user-facing command coverage while preserving deterministic, no-network e2e behavior for local path installs and mocked GitHub marketplace clones.

decisions.decision: Keep small lint-only complexity suppressions on existing import/install orchestration flows.
decisions.rationale: npm run check exposed pre-existing sonar complexity failures in already-shipped orchestration code; minimal comments preserved audited linear flows without behavior changes.

next_action: Create 11-03-SUMMARY.md from Plan 11-03 and commits b5305c0/887be38; repair ROADMAP row formatting; then commit SUMMARY, VALIDATION, REQUIREMENTS, ROADMAP, and any intentional STATE/config changes.
context_notes: Code/test work for Plan 11-03 is committed. Commit b5305c0 added tests/e2e/import-command.test.ts and tests/fixtures/import-command/**. Commit 887be38 fixed lint/format/type issues and committed validation-gate code/test formatting adjustments. npm run check passed after those fixes. Planning docs are not yet committed; ROADMAP was touched by pi-gsd-tools and currently has a malformed Phase 11 row (2/3 Complete with spacing issues), so do not trust that row until corrected after creating the summary.
